text: The afternoon light has gone golden. Dirtus left ten minutes ago claiming he needed to 'acquire materials' — no one asked for clarification. Outside the window, the school is emptying.

speaker: Vermia
text: Before we close today's meeting — [player], I want to formally welcome you. You survived your first session, which is more than can be said for a few others.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Two people left during the Grand Hymn in year one.

speaker: Vermia
text: They weren't ready. That's okay. Scatha is patient.

speaker: Mawla
text: You held up fine. The poem you wrote was good actually.

speaker: Mawla
text: Vermia read them all. I might have glanced.

speaker: Vermia
text: It was INSPIRED. The line about — oh, I don't want to quote it in front of everyone on your first day, it would embarrass you. But I thought it.
You don't remember writing anything that good. You literally just wrote whatever came out. You're slightly worried about what that says about you.

speaker: Grubwin
text: Same time next week? And [player] — fair warning. It escalates.

speaker: Vermia
text: He means the SPIRITUAL JOURNEY. It deepens. Every week. Every poem. You'll see.

speaker: Mawla
text: He means Dirtus is going to try to do the summoning at some point and it's going to be a whole thing.
You walk home in the early evening. The sky is the color of something almost sacred — you don't have a word for it yet. You open your phone and look up 'Scatha Hypixel Skyblock'.
You scroll for a while. You close the tab. You open it again.
You'll figure out what that means later.
